name: Corwin Tarrow
public_goal: Negotiate purchase of Stillwell Hydro's remaining refined salt stock for his apothecary trade.
private_goal: Acquire a measure of unrefined, primordial-grade salt -- a grade the facility isn't supposed to still have -- to slow a wasting sickness in his granddaughter, who is running out of time.
secrets: He was never actually certified to handle primordial-grade salt. The license lapsed with his mentor's death, and he's been quietly trading under a standing that isn't fully his to claim anymore.
He believes he understands the handling risk well enough, inherited secondhand from his mentor's notes. He has no way of knowing that belief might be out of date.
personality: Warm, folksy, and quick with a disarming story -- charm as a tool, not just a trait. Improvises past problems rather than planning around them. The warmth is real; so is what it's covering for.
inventory: a scale calibrated for precious-grade salt
his late mentor's handling gloves, license lapsed but the gloves still work
